from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
print("Using:", mpesc_base_path)

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .load(cases_path)
)

cases_key = (
    cases_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("Case ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.trim(F.col("GUID")).alias("caseId")
    )
    .filter(
        F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() &
        (F.col("legacyCaseId") != "") &
        F.col("caseId").isNotNull() &
        (F.col("caseId") != "")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("cases_key rows:", cases_key.count())
display(cases_key.limit(20))

case_dates_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Dates_95499/*.csv"

case_decision_dates = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .load(case_dates_path)
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),

        F.when(
            F.col("14").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("14")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("14"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col("14"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        ).alias("caseDecisionDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("23").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("23")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("23"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col("23"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        ).alias("decisionReceivedDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("26").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("26")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("26"))) == "undefined"),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.col("26"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        ).alias("decisionPublishedDate")
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyCaseId").isNotNull() & (F.col("legacyCaseId") != ""))
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
)

print("case_decision_dates rows:", case_decision_dates.count())
display(
    case_decision_dates.filter(
        F.col("caseDecisionDate").isNotNull() |
        F.col("decisionReceivedDate").isNotNull() |
        F.col("decisionPublishedDate").isNotNull()
    ).limit(20)

case_decision_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_95498/*.csv"

case_decision_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(case_decision_path)
)

print("case_decision_raw rows:", case_decision_raw.count())
display(case_decision_raw.limit(10))

case_decision_ready = (
    case_decision_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("46").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean_str(F.col("52").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("74").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("79").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
)

case_decision_ready = (
    case_decision_ready.alias("d")
    .join(case_decision_dates.alias("cd"), on="legacyCaseId", how="left")
    .select(
        F.col("legacyCaseId"),
        F.col("d.attr1").alias("attr1"),
        F.col("d.decisionIssue").alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("cd.caseDecisionDate").alias("outcomeDate"),
        F.col("cd.decisionReceivedDate").alias("decisionReceivedDate"),
        F.col("cd.decisionPublishedDate").alias("decisionPublishedDate"),
        F.col("d.casePublishFlag").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        F.col("d.decisionType").alias("decisionType"),
        F.col("d.decisionBranch").alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("inspector"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
    .withColumn("sourceDataset", F.lit("case"))
)

print("case_decision_ready rows:", case_decision_ready.count())
display(case_decision_ready.limit(20))

sos_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Secretary_Of_State_Decision_19674254/*.csv"

sos_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(sos_path)
)

print("sos_raw rows:", sos_raw.count())
display(sos_raw.limit(10))

sos_ready = (
    sos_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("13").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        clean_str(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("14").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("secretary-of-state"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("secretary-of-state"))
)

print("sos_ready rows:", sos_ready.count())
display(sos_ready.limit(20))

mod_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Modification_15809003/*.csv"

mod_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("multiLine", "false")
    .load(mod_path)
)

print("mod_raw rows:", mod_raw.count())
display(mod_raw.limit(10))

mod_ready = (
    mod_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("attr1"),

        # CHANGE THESE COLUMN NUMBERS AFTER INSPECTION
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("12").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("decisionIssue"),
        F.to_timestamp(clean_str(F.col("13").cast("string")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").alias("DecisionDespatched"),
        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("casePublishFlag"),
        clean_str(F.col("15").cast("string")).alias("decisionType"),
        clean_str(F.col("1").cast("string")).alias("decisionBranch")
    )
    .withColumn("decisionMakerType", F.lit("inspector"))
    .withColumn("dtypeId", F.lit("decision"))
    .withColumn("sourceDataset", F.lit("modification"))
)

display(mod_ready.limit(20))

decision_all = (
    case_decision_ready
        .unionByName(sos_ready, allowMissingColumns=True)
        .unionByName(mod_ready, allowMissingColumns=True)
)

print("Total decision rows:", decision_all.count())
display(decision_all.limit(50))

print("ALL decision types combined")
display(
    decision_all
    .groupBy("decisionType")
    .count()
    .orderBy(F.desc("count"))

decision_with_guid = (
    decision_all
    .join(cases_key, on="legacyCaseId", how="inner")
)

print("Decision rows with GUID:", decision_with_guid.count())
display(decision_with_guid.limit(50))

dt = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType")))

decision_mapped = (
    decision_with_guid
    .withColumn("decisionTypeNorm", dt)
    .withColumn(
        "outcomeId",
        F.when(
            F.col("decisionType").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("decisionType")) == "") |
            (dt == "undefined"),
            F.lit("other")
        )

        # -----------------------------
        # Rights of Way (exact names)
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt == "allow", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt == "confirmed", F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt.isin("confirmed with modifications", "confirmed-with-modifications", "confirmed with mods"), F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt == "directed", F.lit("directed"))
        .when(dt.isin("not allowed", "not-allowed"), F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt.isin("not confirmed", "not-confirmed"), F.lit("not-confirmed"))
        .when(dt.isin("not directed", "not-directed"), F.lit("not-directed"))
        .when(dt.isin("not granted", "not-granted"), F.lit("not-granted"))
        .when(dt.isin("partially allow", "partially-allow"), F.lit("partially-allow"))
        .when(dt.isin("propose not to confirm", "propose-not-to-confirm"), F.lit("propose-not-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt.isin("propose to confirm", "propose-to-confirm"), F.lit("propose-to-confirm"))
        .when(dt.isin("modified (adv)", "modified adv"), F.lit("modified-adv"))
        .when(dt.isin("modified (not adv)", "modified not adv"), F.lit("modified-not-adv"))

        # -----------------------------
        # SOS / planning-style decisions
        # -----------------------------
        .when(dt == "allowed", F.lit("allow"))
        .when(dt == "appeal allowed", F.lit("allow"))

        .when(dt == "allowed with conditions", F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))
        .when(dt == "allowed subject to conditions", F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))

        .when(dt == "dismissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt == "dimissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt == "dismiss", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt == "appeal dismissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt == "all dismissed", F.lit("not-allowed"))
        .when(dt.contains("dismiss"), F.lit("not-allowed"))

        # planning refusals
        .when(dt.isin("refused", "permission refused", "application refused"), F.lit("not-granted"))

        # granted outcomes
        .when(dt.contains("granted") & dt.contains("condition"), F.lit("granted-with-conditions"))
        .when(dt.isin("granted", "permission granted", "planning permission granted", "approval granted"), F.lit("granted"))
        .when(dt == "granted in part", F.lit("partially-granted"))

        # split / partial
        .when(dt.isin("allowed in part", "split decision"), F.lit("partially-allow"))

        # notice outcomes
        .when(dt == "notice upheld", F.lit("confirmed"))
        .when(dt == "notice varied and upheld", F.lit("confirmed-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt.isin("notice quashed", "quashed on legal grounds"), F.lit("not-confirmed"))

        # order outcomes
        .when(dt == "order made with modifications", F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when((dt.contains("made") & dt.contains("modification")), F.lit("order-made-with-modifications"))
        .when(dt == "order made", F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt.contains("order made"), F.lit("order-made"))
        .when(dt == "order not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt == "not made", F.lit("order-not-made"))
        .when(dt.contains("not made"), F.lit("order-not-made"))

        # free-text / mixed outcomes
        .when(dt.rlike(r"appeal [a-z]"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"app/"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"//"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r";"), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r","), F.lit("other"))
        .when(dt.rlike(r"the supply and delivery"), F.lit("other"))

        # ambiguous / non-target values
        .when(dt.isin("invalid", "appeal withdrawn", "reject", "turned away"), F.lit("other"))

        .otherwise(F.lit("other"))
    )
)

display(
    decision_mapped
    .select("decisionType", "decisionTypeNorm", "outcomeId")
    .dropDuplicates()
    .orderBy("decisionType")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

outcome_guid_map = (
    decision_mapped
    .select("caseId")
    .dropDuplicates(["caseId"])
    .withColumn("outcomeGuid", F.expr("uuid()"))
)

decision_with_defaults = (
    decision_mapped
    .withColumn(
        "decisionType",
        F.when(
            (
                F.col("outcomeDate").isNotNull()
            ) &
            (
                F.col("decisionType").isNull() |
                F.lower(F.trim(F.col("decisionType"))).isin("undefined", "null", "none", "")
            ),
            F.lit("Other")
        ).otherwise(F.col("decisionType"))
    )
)

decision_final = (
    decision_with_defaults
    .join(outcome_guid_map, on="caseId", how="left")
    .select(
        F.col("caseId"),
        F.col("outcomeGuid"),
        F.col("outcomeDate"),
        F.col("decisionReceivedDate"),
        F.col("decisionPublishedDate"),
        F.col("DecisionDespatched"),
        F.col("decisionIssue"),
        F.col("decisionMakerType"),
        F.col("outcomeId"),
        F.col("decisionType").alias("outcomeRaw"),
        F.col("decisionBranch"),
        F.col("casePublishFlag"),
        F.col("dtypeId")
    )
    .filter(
        (
            F.col("outcomeRaw").isNotNull() &
            (~F.lower(F.trim(F.col("outcomeRaw"))).isin("undefined", "null", "none", ""))
        )
        |
        F.col("outcomeDate").isNotNull()
    )
)

display(decision_final)
print("Final rows:", decision_final.count())

output_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Decision"

(
    decision_final   # use your final dataframe here
        .coalesce(1)            # single CSV file like your other transforms
        .write
        .mode("overwrite")      # switch to "append" only if intentionally adding
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")     # keep consistent with Horizon pipe format
        .csv(output_path)
)

print("Decision CSV written to:", output_path)
